narrative:
Bethel Township has 11,254 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
